description_long: This object is a muscular, humanoid figure with four arms, each arm extended outward in a T-pose, and a broad, powerful chest. Its skin is a pale grayish-white, and it has a fierce, toothy grin with pronounced fangs and red eyes. The head features a fin-like crest and two pointed protrusions, giving it a somewhat monstrous or creature-like appearance. The figure wears a black belt with a gold emblem at the center and black briefs, emphasizing its athletic build. The back view reveals well-defined musculature and the symmetrical arrangement of the four arms. The overall appearance is stylized and cartoonish, with exaggerated proportions and a smooth, matte finish.
description: A muscular, four-armed humanoid creature with a finned head, fierce grin, and black belt, rendered in a stylized, cartoonish style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the creature's broad chest, four outstretched arms, fierce facial expression, and detailed belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the arms, the finned head, and the muscular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical back muscles, four arms, and the back of the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the arm layering and side profile of the head and body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: No visible wings; arms are extended horizontally in a T-pose, mimicking a straight, mid-level configuration.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail structure; the head features a fin-like crest.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; legs are humanoid and standing.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No cockpit present; head is forward and exposed with visible facial features.
